title: Weapon Mastery
wikitext:
[[File:1370123835543.jpg|right|480px]]

==Weapon Mastery==
'''Weapon Mastery''' refers to the ability to use one or more types of close combat weaponry with greater skill than the average person. This classification can be used for any kind of this type of weapon, such as a sword, spear, or knife. However, the degree of one's skill with any particular weapon should be specified in the Intelligence section of the profile page rather than in the Powers and Abilities section.

===Users===
*[[Akame ga Kill!]] characters
*Most Adventurers from [[Dungeons and Dragons]]
*[[Warhammer 40,000]] characters
*[[John Wick (Verse)|John Wick]] characters


[[File:MarksmanshipDD.png|right|thumb|380px|[[Daredevil (Marvel Comics)|Daredevil]] ricocheting his billy club against [[w:c:marvel:Dominic Destine (Earth-616)|Dominic Destine]], who can predict movements.]]

==Marksmanship==
'''Marksmanship''' is a form of Weapon Mastery that refers to extremely high skill and ability to shoot and hit targets with firearms or projectiles. It involves a combination of knowledge, technique, focus, and physical coordination. The term is often associated with firearms, such as rifles, pistols, and shotguns, but it can also apply to bows, crossbows or any other type of projectile.

Characters possessing an extraordinary level of accuracy often employ this particular technique as a means to surprise their enemies through the implementation of ricochet attacks, whereby projectiles rebound off surfaces, thus catching opponents off guard with unpredictable trajectories, and concurrently exploiting the vulnerability inherent in targeting weak points of the body, such as vital organs or susceptible joints.

===Users===
*[[Daredevil (Marvel Comics)|Daredevil]], [[Bullseye (Marvel Comics)|Bullseye]], [[Hawkeye (Marvel Comics)|Hawkeye]], and other [[Marvel Comics]] characters.
*[[Batman (Post-Crisis)|Batman]], [[Deadshot (Floyd Lawton)|Deadshot]] and other [[DC Comics]] characters.
*[[Gyro Zeppeli]] from [[JoJo's Bizarre Adventure|JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run]].
*Most Ninjas from the [[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]] series.
*[[Kaina Tsutsumi (Lady Nagant)|Lady Nagant]] from [[My Hero Academia]].
